# 2026-04-04 - @3design Log

## Entry 1
### Human Prompt
Perform @3design for project `prj0000122` on branch `prj0000122-jwt-refresh-token-support` in repository `c:\Dev\PyAgent`.

### Agent Response
Validated the branch gate, read the project overview and discovery artifact, inspected the current backend auth, route, WebSocket, and test surfaces, and finalized a phase-one design for backend-managed refresh sessions. The design resolves bootstrap as API-key exchange only in phase one, resolves persistence as a dedicated file-backed single-instance session store, defines additive `/v1/auth/session`, `/v1/auth/refresh`, and `/v1/auth/logout` contracts, preserves legacy auth compatibility, and records ADR `0008-backend-managed-refresh-sessions-for-jwt-renewal.md` for the new auth-session architecture.

## Entry 2
### Human Prompt
You are @3design, the PyAgent design agent for `prj0000124-llm-gateway`. Produce `docs/project/prj0000124-llm-gateway/llm-gateway.design.md` from selected Option C and complete required ADR/memory/log/validation/commit outputs.

### Agent Response
Validated branch alignment (`prj0000124-llm-gateway`), loaded project/think/governance/policy artifacts, and produced a complete Option C hybrid split-plane design in `docs/project/prj0000124-llm-gateway/llm-gateway.design.md`. The design defines control/data plane boundaries, nine explicit gateway interfaces, envelope contracts, end-to-end lifecycle, fail-closed error matrix, security enforcement points, state/persistence model, integration points for provider/routing/resilience/backend modules, phased constraints for @4plan, acceptance criteria with AC IDs, and interface-to-task traceability. Created ADR `docs/architecture/adr/0009-llm-gateway-hybrid-split-plane.md`, then updated `current.3design.memory.md` and this dated log for operational continuity.
